title: Textile
description: small changes to leather armor as well as new paper recipes (rotten flesh to leather recipe integrated)
body:
This small mod makes leather armor a bit more survival-friendly and lets you create paper out of bamboo, seagrass and leather.

**Leather Armor Changes**  
Theres never been a real use of leather armor because it's usually such a short time period between spawning into the world and getting iron armor, that it's better just to spare up for bookshelves
until you got yourself a enchanting table.

But now you can invest (with some luck) only around 4 leather for 28% armor reduction 
(iron armor is 60%) as you get the rest of the invested leather back!
This both encourages using leather armor until it breaks and actually investing the time to even make it in the first place.

[Actual Recycling Values]                     
Helmet = 1-3 returned                       
Chestplate = 3-6 returned                    
Leggings = 2-5 returned             
Boots = 1-2 returned                                

**Paper Recipe Additions**  
It's quite unrealistic how you can only make paper from sugar cane although there are many other things here that you could make it out of just as well.

I know theres alot of sugarcane lying around, but that stuff sometimes takes quite the time to grow if you're busy doing other things. So this mod eases things and lets that seagrass rotting in the chest or the uncollected bamboo sitting there for weeks have a use (also cow farms get more use ig)!

[Recipes]                                 
3 Bamboo = 1 Paper                                 
3 Seagrass = 1 Paper                  
1 Leather = 2 Paper               

*Final Note:* This mod adds rotten flesh to leather smelting recipe as well so thats neat.

*made with MCreator*
